response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of software development experience, comfortably exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent senior/staff-level roles at Stripe and Shopify working across full-stack TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) — directly aligned with the role's primary stack and AI agent requirement. Strong background in testing, TDD, and craftsmanship practices fits the testing framework expectations. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and React depth (React is mentioned only briefly at Shopify), and no clear Kotlin experience, but the breadth and seniority compensate.
strengths: Recent Stripe role covers TypeScript/Node.js full-stack plus AI agent/MCP tooling, matching key requirements
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching workshops
Broad multi-language proficiency (TS, Java, C/C++, D, PHP) and infrastructure experience (Docker, Kubernetes, GitLab CI)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned; React exposure appears limited to one role
No Kotlin experience listed despite being a secondary requirement
Heavy emphasis on D-lang/niche stacks in earlier roles may signal preference away from the primary modern stack

key_factors.factor: Full-stack TS/Node experience at senior level
Missing Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifics
